name: Kaufmann Park Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Kaufmann Park Courts in Tahlequah, OK! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The court lines are permanent. The courts are free.

name: Markoma Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Markoma Gym in Tahlequah, OK! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
